SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.reactor

Enum Class CatalystDeactivationKinetics.CatalystFamily

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<CatalystDeactivationKinetics.CatalystFamily>
neqsim.process.equipment.reactor.CatalystDeactivationKinetics.CatalystFamily
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<CatalystDeactivationKinetics.CatalystFamily>, Constable
Enclosing class:
CatalystDeactivationKinetics
public static enum CatalystDeactivationKinetics.CatalystFamily extends Enum<CatalystDeactivationKinetics.CatalystFamily>
Catalyst families used in hydrogen production and carrier cracking service.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E extends Enum<E>>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    COPPER_ZINC_LT_SHIFT
    Copper-zinc low-temperature shift catalyst.
    IRON_CHROMIUM_HT_SHIFT
    Iron-chromium high-temperature shift catalyst.
    NICKEL_REFORMING
    Nickel reforming catalyst for SMR, pre-reforming and methanation side service.
    RUTHENIUM_AMMONIA_CRACKING
    Ruthenium catalyst for ammonia cracking.

    • NICKEL_REFORMING

      public static final CatalystDeactivationKinetics.CatalystFamily NICKEL_REFORMING
      Nickel reforming catalyst for SMR, pre-reforming and methanation side service.

      Iron-chromium high-temperature shift catalyst.

  • Constructor Details

    • CatalystFamily

      private CatalystFamily(String displayName, double sulfurCoefficientPerHourPerPpm, double chlorideCoefficientPerHourPerPpm, double cokingCoefficientPerHour, double sinteringPreExponentialPerHour, double sinteringActivationEnergyJPerMol, double sinteringOnsetTemperatureK)
      Creates a catalyst-family default data set.
      Parameters:
      displayName - human-readable catalyst name
      sulfurCoefficientPerHourPerPpm - sulfur poisoning coefficient in 1/(h ppmv)
      chlorideCoefficientPerHourPerPpm - chloride poisoning coefficient in 1/(h ppmv)
      cokingCoefficientPerHour - coking damage coefficient in 1/h
      sinteringPreExponentialPerHour - sintering pre-exponential factor in 1/h
      sinteringActivationEnergyJPerMol - sintering activation energy in J/mol
      sinteringOnsetTemperatureK - sintering onset temperature in K

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static CatalystDeactivationKinetics.CatalystFamily[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static CatalystDeactivationKinetics.CatalystFamily valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

      Gets a human-readable catalyst-family name.
